name: copilot-flow
description: AI collaboration workflow plugin - Implements automated collaborative development process between Claude and Copilot through structured 5-stage workflow
capabilities: Orchestrates a 5-stage AI collaboration workflow between Claude and Copilot
Analyzes requirements and creates structured development plans
Generates architecture designs using Copilot recommendations
Implements code following collaborative design specifications
Performs automated code quality reviews and security assessments
Delivers complete packages with documentation and integration
author: Aykahshi
securitySummary: All static findings are false positives. The skill is a legitimate AI collaboration workflow orchestrator that coordinates development tasks between Claude and Copilot. Static scanner detected patterns in metadata fields (hash values, URLs) and documentation file references that do not represent security risks.
valueStatement: This skill enables structured collaboration between Claude and Copilot through a 5-stage workflow that handles requirements analysis, architecture design, code implementation, quality review, and final delivery.
limitations: Requires copilot-mcp-server skill for design and review phases
Does not execute code directly - relies on Claude for implementation
Full workflow requires user confirmation before execution
State persistence depends on claude-mem integration

useCases.title: Enterprise Development Teams
useCases.description: Coordinate AI-assisted development across multiple team members with standardized workflows, automated code reviews, and consistent documentation practices.

useCases.title: Code Review Automation
useCases.description: Automate the code review process by leveraging Copilot for quality assessment and Claude for implementing improvements based on feedback.

useCases.title: New Developer Onboarding
useCases.description: Guide new team members through structured development workflows with clear stages for learning and contributing to projects.

promptTemplates.title: Full Workflow Request
promptTemplates.prompt: 執行 copilot-flow 實現[具體功能描述]
promptTemplates.scenario: Start a complete 5-stage workflow for a new feature

promptTemplates.title: Analysis Phase
promptTemplates.prompt: /copilot-flow:analyze [分析現有代碼庫並提出改進建議]
promptTemplates.scenario: Break down requirements for a feature or improvement

promptTemplates.title: Review Phase
promptTemplates.scenario: Request code review for specific files or modules

promptTemplates.title: Resume from Stage
promptTemplates.scenario: Continue a workflow from a specific stage after interruption

bestPractices: Start with clear, specific requirements before initiating the workflow
Review stage outputs before confirming progression to the next stage
Use individual stage commands for targeted tasks rather than full workflow
Preserve workflow state files to enable recovery after interruptions
antiPatterns: Skipping stages in full workflow mode without reviewing intermediate outputs
Modifying stage output files manually before workflow completion
Running stages out of sequence without understanding dependencies
Ignoring review recommendations without evaluating their validity

faq.question: What skills are required for copilot-flow to work?
faq.answer: This skill requires copilot-mcp-server for design and review phases, and claude-mem for workflow state persistence. Ensure these skills are installed before using copilot-flow.

faq.question: Can I execute individual stages independently?
faq.answer: Yes, each stage can be executed independently using slash commands like /copilot-flow:analyze, /copilot-flow:design, /copilot-flow:implement, /copilot-flow:review, and /copilot-flow:deliver.

faq.question: How does the workflow handle interruptions?
faq.answer: The workflow maintains state in .claude/workflow-state.json. After interruption, you can resume from the last completed stage or restart from a specific stage using /copilot-flow:[stage-name].

faq.question: What triggers activate this skill?
faq.answer: The skill activates with phrases like '請 Copilot 協助' (Please ask Copilot), '詢問 Copilot' (Ask Copilot), '執行 copilot-flow' (Execute copilot-flow), or commands starting with 'copilot-flow:' or 'c-flow:'.

faq.question: Does this skill execute code directly?
faq.answer: No, the skill orchestrates the workflow but does not execute code itself. Claude handles implementation phases using file system tools, while Copilot provides design and review recommendations.

faq.question: What output files are generated?
faq.answer: The workflow generates analysis-result.md, architecture-design.md, implementation-report.md, code-review-report.md, and a complete delivery package in the delivery/ directory.
